name: Beef a Roni
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground beef in a large frying pan.
2. Add spaghetti sauce, tomato sauce, corn, sliced mushrooms, and chopped onion.
3. Simmer until the mushrooms are cooked.
4. Add seasonings and continue to simmer.
5. In a large pot, cook the pasta shells and drain.
6. Mix the sauce with the shells and serve.
7. Leftovers are even better; I always make extra.
